seoTitle: Wubin vs Wungong — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Wubin and Wungong. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wubin and Wungong.
heading: Wubin vs Wungong — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wubin, Western Australia and Wungong, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wubin has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Wungong (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wubin or Wungong safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wubin has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Wungong scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wubin scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. Wungong scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wubin or Wungong?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wubin has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.53% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
